title: A Resolution Approving the Devolution Transition Plan of the Municipality of Los Baños Providing the Municipal Government with a Roadmap to Ensure Strategic, Systematic and Coherent Actions Towards the Full Implementation of Functions, Services and Facilities to Be Fully Devolved by National Government Agencies (NGAS) Concerned, Starting in Fy 2022. (AUTHOR: COUNCILOR GERONIMO A. CICERON, 11/08/2021)
